---
title: "Riemannian Flow Matching for Protein Backbone Generation"
date: 2026-07-13
categories: [GDL + COT]
---

{{< include README.qmd >}}

---

- [Project Notebook (Code)](https://github.com/shreeshb51/shreeshb51.github.io/blob/main/projects/Riemannian%20Flow%20Matching%20for%20Protein%20Backbone%20Generation/project_6_riemannian_flow_matching.ipynb)
- [Mathematical Framework](mathematical_framework.md)
- [Solving an Anchor Example](solving_anchor_example.md)

---
